author: @parrotbrand2782
text: I highly recommend the Shanghai Museum (East branch). It is a large white  rectangular building. It is free. It is one of the most impressive museums i have been. There are people who wipe the glass every 5 min so fingerprints wont obstruct your view. Going there made me realised that China is more advanced than most western countries
